name: Bounce Blast 3D
core_loop: Players tap to select and place colored blocks from a tray into a main grid to clear obstacles, which then transform into bouncing balls that trigger physics-based chain reactions to clear the level.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle players, aged 25-55, who enjoy satisfying physics-based games as a relaxing time-filler.

palette.description: A dark, moody background with deep purple UI frames and a bright yellow-orange accent for progress bars and highlights.
